title: Private health insurance rebate
description: The private health insurance rebate is a government contribution to help with the cost of your private health insurance.
keywords: health insurance, PHI, private health insurance, insurance rebate, PHI rebate, eligible health insurance, health insurance rebate, MLS, medicare, medicare levy surcharge, medicare surcharge, rebate

child_links.title: Private health insurance rebate eligibility
child_links.description: Eligibility for the private health insurance rebate depends on your circumstances, including your policy and income.

child_links.title: Claiming the private health insurance rebate
child_links.description: How to claim the private health insurance rebate, how to claim for your spouse and if you have prepaid your premium.

child_links.title: Lifetime health cover
child_links.description: LHC is a loading added to your hospital premium if you didn't have private hospital cover from the year you turn 31.

child_links.title: Income thresholds and rates for the private health insurance rebate
child_links.description: Find out the private health insurance rebate income thresholds and rebate percentage rates.

child_links.title: Your private health insurance statement
child_links.description: Your statement gives you information about your private health insurance premiums and private patient hospital cover.

child_links.title: Overseas visitors – private health insurance on your tax return
child_links.description: Help for overseas visitors to complete the Medicare levy surcharge and private health insurance section on a tax return.
